data.title: $3.7M BTC stolen in cybersecurity breach at Bitcoin Depot, with 50.9 BTC taken from internal systems.
data.description: A total of 50.9 Bitcoins, equivalent to around $3.7 million, was reportedly stolen from Bitcoin Depot by a hacker who managed to breach internal systems connected to corporate wallets.

data.title: EpicQuest Education Announces New Revenue Stream via Davis University’s High School Acceleration and Pathway Programs
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, on April 9, 2026, EpicQuest Education Group International Limited (Nasdaq: EEIQ) shared that the company, a prominent higher education provider for both local and global students in the US, Canada, and the UK, disclosed a notable development. Their subsidiary, Davis University, has successfully finalized agreements with four Canadian high schools. These agreements pave the way for high school students to join high school accelerated programs and University pathway programs. This is made possible by enrolling in Davis University's introductory online courses belonging to the Bachelor of Science in Business program. This collaboration marks a significant opportunity for students aiming to fast-track their education and potentially enter the University setting earlier.

data.title: Duggal Greenhouse Expands Event Campus
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York on April 9, 2026, Duggal Greenhouse and Brooklyn Fish Transfer have merged to create a consolidated event campus within the Brooklyn Navy Yard. The partnership has increased the total space to 65,000 square feet by bringing together the adjacent properties into one cohesive location.
Israeli military issues evacuation warning for Beirut's southern suburbs ahead of possible attack - Statement

data.title: Data Storage Corporation Reschedules Fiscal 2025 Business Update Call for April 14, 2026 at 11:00 am Eastern Time
data.description: Data Storage Corporation (Nasdaq: DTST) has postponed its business update conference call to April 14, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will cover the financial results for the 2025 fiscal year, concluding on December 31, 2025, along with company advancements and other key updates.

data.title: Inflectra Launches Free Early Access for SureWire™: The First Specialized QA Platform Built to Stress-Test AI Agents
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Inflectra introduced its Early Access Program for SureWire™, aiming to enhance software lifecycle management. The program offers a quality assurance environment specifically for AI agents transitioning from research to production. This launch marks a significant step for Inflectra, showcasing its commitment to innovation in the tech industry.

data.title: More Than Half of Americans Are Dating Less Due to Rising Costs, New Louis Jadot Survey Finds
data.description: Renowned wine producer Louis Jadot and financial advisor Farnoosh Torabi have collaborated to introduce The Loveflation Edit, a fresh initiative delving into the impact of increasing expenses on contemporary relationships. Noteworthy findings reveal that 56% of individuals in America have experienced a decline in their frequency of dating due to rising costs. Specifically, 27% have altogether halted their dating activities due to financial constraints.

data.title: Sigma360 and Consilient Announce Strategic Integration to Transform Financial Crime Detection with Federated Machine Learning Driven pKYC and Transaction Risk Monitoring
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Sigma360 and Consilient, two leading companies in AI technology for risk intelligence, financial crime prevention, and compliance, revealed a strategic partnership. Sigma360 is known for its full-stack AI platform, while Consilient specializes in federated machine learning for identifying and preventing financial crimes. This collaboration is set to enhance capabilities in detecting and combating financial crimes, benefiting clients seeking advanced solutions in this field.
US POSTAL SERVICE SAYS IT IS TEMPORARILY SUSPENDING CONTRIBUTIONS FOR EMPLOYEE DEFINED BENEFITS TO CONSERVE CASH

data.title: Western Alliance Bank Finances The Marvel in the Mission, the Largest Affordable Housing Development in San Francisco’s Mission District
data.description: In San Francisco, Western Alliance Bank (NYSE: WAL) has announced its provision of $77.9 million in construction financing and Low Income Housing Tax Credit equity for The Marvel in the Mission. This development, located at the intersection of 16th and Mission streets, will be the largest affordable housing project in the Mission District. With 136 units, it will cater to low-income families and previously homeless individuals. Western Alliance's partnership with Mission Housing Development Corporation has facilitated this endeavor.

data.title: O'Shaughnessy Ventures Backs Scientist Building Next-Generation Artificial Muscles
data.description: Joshua Ince has been granted an O'Shaughnessy Fellowship in Greenwich, Conn., as announced on April 9, 2026. This fellowship is from O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV), an investment firm supporting creators. Ince will utilize this opportunity to develop affordable and lightweight artificial muscles for robotics and prosthetics. The fellowship aims to promote innovation in the field, with a particular focus on enhancing technology for these applications. This fellowship will provide financial support and resources for Ince's project, contributing to advancements in the robotics and prosthetics industry.

data.title: WooCommerce Tactical Websites Find Solutions to Payment Processing Challenges
data.description: In Windham, Maine on April 9, 2026, Blue Payment Agency introduced a secure payment processing solution tailored for WooCommerce-based tactical e-commerce businesses. This new offering provides a stable alternative for merchants impacted by account closures from leading payment providers. This solution aims to cater to retailers in the tactical e-commerce sector and provide them with a dependable platform. The initiative comes in response to the challenges faced by many online businesses, with a goal to offer a reliable payment processing option.

data.title: National Menopause Foundation Expands Board Leadership
data.description: Anisha Madan and Rhonda Powell have joined the National Menopause Foundation (NMF) as new directors. NMF, a nonprofit organization based in Alexandria, Virginia, announced the appointment of the healthcare finance executive, Anisha Madan, and legal & governance leader, Rhonda Powell, on April 9, 2026. The foundation, recognized as a 501(c)(3) organization, focuses on revolutionizing women's perspectives on menopause.

data.title: New PRI Study Finds California Job Growth Lags Nation, High Costs Turn State's Income Advantage into 35% Deficit
data.description: In a recent study by the Pacific Research Institute released on April 9, 2026, it was discovered that California's economic growth has significantly lagged behind the rest of the United States. Since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, job creation in California has only reached less than 50% of the national average. This means that California is experiencing a slower rate of job growth compared to the overall economic performance of the country.

data.title: Lightbridge Academy Launches Partnership with Curious Jane
data.description: Curious Jane, a renowned media and creative agency focusing on franchise and multi-location brands, has been selected as the preferred media partner for brands across its network of 200 operational and upcoming locations. Headquartered in LAKELAND, Fla., this marks a significant step for Curious Jane in fostering growth and innovation within the industry. The selection showcases their expertise and credibility in the market, positioning them for further success in the future. The agency's proven track record and nationwide recognition make them a valuable asset for brands looking to enhance their presence in the competitive market space.

data.title: Oracle releases 8 AI agent apps for HR tasks, like scheduling and hiring, to automate decision-making in Fusion Agentic Applications.
data.description: Oracle has introduced Fusion Agentic Applications for HR, which feature AI agents capable of independently making decisions regarding scheduling, hiring, and talent management. These innovative applications signal a shift towards autonomous decision-making processes in key HR functions.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From JPMorgan Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, April 14. Analysts are projecting earnings of $5.48 per share, an increase from $5.07 per share in the previous year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $48.80 billion, up from $45.31 billion last year. The company's annual dividend yield is currently at 1.95%, with a quarterly payout of $1.50 per share ($6.00 annually). Investors are keeping an eye on potential gains from dividends. To earn $500 monthly from JPMorgan, the yearly target of $6,000 ($500 x 12 months) needs to be met. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
